10-27=10-DUr;;1960 Newcal
11-20=11-17;;M1617
12-09=12-08o;;1570 M1617
#= Although scans of Ordos from 1878, 1889, and 1895 from Luxembourg show that - in practice - they had let
#= the Immaculate Conception outrank the 2nd Sunday of Advent, by the rubrics this was not yet permitted (pre-1897).
#= For consistency with the transfer of S. Joseph in Dom. lit. A (and against Ordo Luxembourg 1882), it gets transferred, too.
12-09=12-08;;1888 Newcal
12-09=12-09-da;;DA
12-29=Tempora/Nat1-0a;;1570 1888 1906 1960 DA Newcal M1963 M1617 M1930
12-29=Tempora/Nat1-0a~Tempora/Nat29;;CAV
12-30=12-29o;;1570 1888 M1617
dirge1=01-19 02-04;;1570
dirge1=01-23 02-04;;M1617
dirge1=01-28 02-11;;1888 
dirge1=01-28 02-12;;1906
dirge3=07-08 08-02 09-02 10-01 11-13 12-02 12-16 12-23;;1570
dirge3=07-08 08-02 09-02 10-01 11-15 12-02 12-16 12-23;;M1617
dirge3=07-09 08-09 09-03 10-01 11-16 12-23;;1888 1906
Hy07-22=1;;DA
